title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: Likely breakpoints: - `--env-file` path policy hardening can break secret bootstrap flows if callers still pass repo-local env files (for example `./.env`, `.env.local`), even though docs now require outside-workspace env files. [sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh) [sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/scripts/local/sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh) [org-secrets.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/docs/org-secrets.md) [org-secrets.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/docs/org-secrets.md) - If tightening is implemented as a broad “deny any `.env` file access” rule (not just repo-local), it will likely break existing unit tests that intentionally create temporary env files under `/tmp` for explicit env-file loading and parser safety checks. [test-shared-secret-plane.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-shared-secret-plane.sh) [test-shared-secret-plane.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/tests/test-shared-secret-plane.sh) [test-freee-secret-bootstrap.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-freee-secret-bootstrap.sh) [test-freee-secret-bootstrap.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/tests/test-freee-secret-bootstrap.sh) - `agent-orchestration` has a test that explicitly writes `.env` in a temp working directory to ensure workspace `.env` is ignored. Over-broad `.env` blocking can false-fail this test. [estat.test.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/search/__tests__/estat.test.js) Tests to rerun: 1. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-shared-secret-plane.sh` 2. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/tests/test-shared-secret-plane.sh` 3. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-freee-secret-bootstrap.sh` 4. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/tests/test-freee-secret-bootstrap.sh` 5. `node --test /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/search/__tests__/estat.test.js` 6. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/local/sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh --env-file /secure/outside-workspace/bootstrap.env --dry-run` 7. `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/scripts/local/sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh --env-file /secure/outside-workspace/bootstrap.env --dry-run`
